headline: VERSES AI Announces New Strategic Direction, Discontinuation of AI Operations, and Pursuit of Strategic Alternatives
summary: VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE:VERS) (OTCQB:VRSSD) ("VERSES'' or the "Company"), a cognitive computing company specializing in next-generation intelligent software systems today announced that, following a strategic review of its business operations and market opportunities, the Company intends to discontinue its artificial intelligence ("AI") research and development activities and refocus its efforts on evaluating and pursuing alternative business opportunities.

raw.headline: VERSES AI Announces New Strategic Direction, Discontinuation of AI Operations, and Pursuit of Strategic Alternatives

headline: BTQ TECHNOLOGIES ANNOUNCES AT-THE-MARKET EQUITY PROGRAM
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, today announced its at-the-market equity program (the "ATM Program") to offer and sell up to C$150,000,000 (or its equivalent in other currencies) of its common shares ("Common Shares").

headline: Some Call SpaceX A Meme Stock. PitchBook Sees An AI Infrastructure Boom.
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX pulled off the biggest IPO ever. For investors, there are still issues to sort out. For one, is SPCX a meme stock?

headline: Tax-Exempt Muni Income or Corporate Bond Yield? SMB vs. VCSH
summary: The VanEck Short Muni ETF (SMB) and the Vanguard Short-Term Corporate Bond ETF (VCSH) both appeal to short-term bond investors, but the higher yield is not the only number that matters as taxes and account type can also affect the comparison.
